parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "mistral",
  "prompt": "For the plant '{{ $json.name_en }}' ({{ $json.name_latin }}), answer two questions:
1. Which soil nutrients does it DEPLETE? Choose from: nitrogen, phosphorus, potassium, calcium, magnesium
2. Which soil nutrients does it RESTORE? Choose from: nitrogen, phosphorus, potassium, calcium, magnesium

Reply in this exact format:
DEPLETES: nutrient1, nutrient2
RESTORES: nutrient1, nutrient2

If none, write DEPLETES: none or RESTORES: none",
  "stream": false
}

={
  "model": "mistral",
  "prompt": "For the plant '{{ $json.name_en }}' ({{ $json.name_latin }}), answer two questions about crop rotation:
1. Which plants grow WELL AFTER this plant? (i.e. this plant leaves the soil in good condition for them)
2. Which plants should be AVOIDED AFTER this plant? (i.e. they share diseases or this plant depletes what they need)

Reply in this exact format:
FOLLOWS_WELL_AFTER: plant1, plant2
AVOID_AFTER: plant1, plant2

If none, write FOLLOWS_WELL_AFTER: none or AVOID_AFTER: none
Use only common English plant names.",
  "stream": false
}
